mnemonics.title: Six IoT Levels Progression
mnemonics.content: **S-SAN-MC:** Single → Storage → Analytics → Nodes-local → Multiple-cloud → Mixed(hybrid) — Remember: "Single Sensor Analyzes, Networks Multiply to Cloud" — each level adds one capability on top of the previous.

mnemonics.title: Four Deployment Templates
mnemonics.content: **CEFH:** Cloud-centric, Edge-centric, Fog computing, Hybrid — Remember: "Chef" (rearranged) cooks IoT solutions — Cloud is remote kitchen, Edge is table-side, Fog is the pass, Hybrid uses all three.

mnemonics.title: CapEx vs OpEx Rule
mnemonics.content: **Edge = CapEx, Cloud = OpEx:** Edge devices cost more upfront (buy expensive hardware), Cloud costs more over time (ongoing subscriptions). Remember: "Edge buys, Cloud rents."

mnemonics.title: Five Design Considerations
mnemonics.content: **SNSCD:** Scalability, Network conditions, Security, Cost (CapEx/OpEx), Data processing needs — Remember: "Smart Networks Secure Cheap Data"

mnemonics.title: Level-to-Template Real-World Mapping
mnemonics.content: **Home-Factory-Farm:** Smart Home = L4 + Edge (local hub), Industrial = L6 + Hybrid (safety+analytics), Agriculture = L5 + Cloud (remote sensors → cloud analysis)
